M-008.NAME: tasks
M-008.owns: scheduler and recurring maintenance jobs including subscription expiry, daily cleanup, configurable anti-abuse handshake scans, KPprotoN MTProto policy replay, Phase-43 MTProto analytics maintenance jobs, and Phase-45 pending trial activation scans

exports.fn-detect-handshake-anomalies: Configurable seconds-based job that delegates live peer observations to M-023/M-031
exports.task-mtproto-policy-sync: Fixed-interval job that delegates active KPprotoN SNI policy replay to M-044
exports.task-mtproto-phase43-analytics-maintenan: Phase-43 jobs for telemetry ingest, abuse scan, rollup rebuild, raw event retention, IP observation retention, and storage-budget health checks.
exports.task-trial-handshake-activation: Phase-45 job that scans VPN clients with last_handshake_at and activates pending trials idempotently.

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-19: Phase-41 restored scheduler MTProto reconciliation to M-044 KPprotoN runtime replay and local scheduler regression passed.
evidence.evidence-2: 2026-05-20: Phase-43 scheduler regression passed for MTProto telemetry ingest, rollup rebuild, abuse alert scan, raw event/IP retention, and storage-budget health job registration.
evidence.evidence-3: 2026-06-01: Phase-45 backend suite passed for activate_pending_trials job registration and first-handshake activation behavior.
